indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_resume_upload_processing_task_id ON public.resume_upload USING btree (processing_task_id)
indexes.name: idx_resume_upload_processing_task_id

indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_resume_variant_match ON public.resume_variant USING btree (match_id)
indexes.name: idx_resume_variant_match

indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_resume_variant_owner_created ON public.resume_variant USING btree (owner_id, created_at)
indexes.name: idx_resume_variant_owner_created

indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_resume_variant_owner_tenant_match ON public.resume_variant USING btree (owner_id, tenant_id, match_id)
indexes.name: idx_resume_variant_owner_tenant_match

indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX uq_resume_variant_current_global ON public.resume_variant USING btree (owner_id, match_id, template_key, template_version, generation_mode, tone, generator_version, renderer_version, evidence_policy_version, source_match_updated_at, source_match_calculated_at, source_job_content_hash, source_resume_updated_at, source_resume_content_hash) WHERE (tenant_id IS NULL)
indexes.name: uq_resume_variant_current_global

indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX uq_resume_variant_current_tenant ON public.resume_variant USING btree (owner_id, tenant_id, match_id, template_key, template_version, generation_mode, tone, generator_version, renderer_version, evidence_policy_version, source_match_updated_at, source_match_calculated_at, source_job_content_hash, source_resume_updated_at, source_resume_content_hash) WHERE (tenant_id IS NOT NULL)
indexes.name: uq_resume_variant_current_tenant

indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_structured_resume_fingerprint ON public.structured_resume USING btree (resume_fingerprint)
indexes.name: idx_structured_resume_fingerprint

indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_structured_resume_owner_resume ON public.structured_resume USING btree (owner_id, resume_fingerprint)

indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_structured_resume_years ON public.structured_resume USING btree (total_experience_years)
indexes.name: idx_structured_resume_years

indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX ix_structured_resume_resume_fingerprint ON public.structured_resume USING btree (resume_fingerprint)
indexes.name: ix_structured_resume_resume_fingerprint

indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_user_auth_identity_email ON public.user_auth_identity USING btree (email_normalized)
indexes.name: idx_user_auth_identity_email

indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_user_auth_identity_user_provider ON public.user_auth_identity USING btree (user_id, provider)
indexes.name: idx_user_auth_identity_user_provider

indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_user_feature_capability_owner_feature ON public.user_feature_capability USING btree (owner_id, feature_key)
indexes.name: idx_user_feature_capability_owner_feature

indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_user_files_created_at ON public.user_files USING btree (created_at)

indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_user_files_storage_key ON public.user_files USING btree (storage_key)

indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_unc_verif_hash_pending ON public.user_notification_channel USING btree (verification_token_hash) WHERE (verification_token_hash IS NOT NULL)

indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_user_notification_channel_last_tested ON public.user_notification_channel USING btree (last_tested_at)

indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_user_notification_channel_owner ON public.user_notification_channel USING btree (owner_id)
